## Witnessmark Checklist

All items must be checked before this PR can merge.

### Layer Integrity
- [ ] All content in this PR belongs in **tiezerk** (universal concepts layer)
- [ ] No character/entity content that belongs in **ashkharh**
- [ ] No play/dev environment content that belongs in **nexusiam**

### Principles
- [ ] Content is in **shadow state** — exploratory, not over-finalized
- [ ] Changes are **One Hertz** — focused, not sweeping
- [ ] Timestamps use `YYYYMMDDHHMMSS` format (if any timestamps present)

### Review
- [ ] Claude has run `/final-review` and produced a record in `.claude/reviews/`
- [ ] Review record recommends Witnessmark (or this is a minor infrastructure change)

### Eric's Gate
- [ ] Eric has reviewed the content and Claude's assessment
- [ ] Eric is ready to issue the Witnessmark (merge = Witnessmark)
